# Streamline Icons Usage Notice

## Icon Set
Simjot uses the **Streamline Ultimate Light (Free)** icon set (24x24 SVG/PNG).

## License
These icons are **royalty-free** and included under Streamline's free license terms.

## Usage
- Icons are located in `img/icons/streamline-ultimate-light---free--24x24-SVG/` and `img/icons/streamline-ultimate-light---free--24x24-PNG/`
- Used throughout the Simjot application for UI elements and navigation
- No attribution required for free tier usage

## Icon Set Details
- **Name**: Streamline Ultimate Light - Free
- **Size**: 24x24 pixels
- **Format**: SVG and PNG
- **License**: Free tier (royalty-free)

## For More Information
Visit: https://streamlinehq.com

---
*This notice ensures compliance with Streamline's licensing terms.*
